content_body: This cabin was simply gorgeous. It looked exactly like the pictures. It was very clean and kept in impeccable condition. The view from the deck was breathtaking. I flew in from Philadelphia and drove to Majestic Lake. It was a very pleasant drive and not even 2 hours from the airport. I would highly recommend staying in this cabin if you're looking for a cozy getaway. It was far enough to remove any noise or distractions, but close enough for a quick run to the supermarket or Red Box. Majestic Lake Cabin by far exceeded my expectations.
title: "By Far Exceeded My Expectations"
